releaseRecommendation: Demo release recommended for the current online demo. Production release is not recommended until production data, object storage, observability, alerting, account lifecycle, audit, and operational controls are completed.
remainingGaps: Health material UI currently displays material data/refs rather than a dedicated image gallery.
Production hardening remains outside M06: production data, object storage, monitoring, alerting, account lifecycle, audit, and operational controls.
notes: Vercel Production deployment dpl_2deiGCWt2HZPN4qx1PbFRJFuNHvE is READY for https://www.smartchildcare.cn and was built from GitHub main commit 46f0845. Online API summary: 36 director children, 18 Li children, 18 Zhou children, 49 meal GPT refs, 14 growth GPT refs, 19 health GPT refs, 4 storybook GPT refs, 119 accepted GPT Image 2 assets. No business logic, env files, Vercel env, vivo provider, permissions, or fallback behavior was changed.
